note: Generation recipes for the shared SFX library (media/library/sfx/). SOURCE OF TRUTH for what the library should contain: one entry per reusable, generically-named sound. tools/gen_sfx.py reads this, generates any MISSING clip via the ElevenLabs Sound Effects API, loudness-normalizes it, and writes media/library/sfx/catalog.json. Organized by FUNCTION (what the sound's JOB is), after the pro-editor model (see brand.md §10): motion (whoosh) · tension (riser) · emphasis (impact/reveal) · snap (click). page-flip + chime-reward are brand-specific extras. Brand taste: calm/premium (Linear/Anthropic/Vercel) — soft, understated, felt-not-heard; we take the pro's STRUCTURE + layering but keep our restraint (no cymbal-urgency risers, no trailer slams).

sounds.prompt: A short, soft air whoosh for a scene transition. Smooth gentle movement of air in the low-mids, premium and restrained, not aggressive or bright. Quick and clean, no metallic ring, no music.

A soft, drawn-out wind whoosh for a gliding transition. Smooth airy sustained movement of air, gentle and premium, like floating through the shot. Longer and softer than a quick whoosh, no aggression, no metallic ring, no music.
A short, gentle upward riser building light anticipation. Smooth airy swell, calm and premium, subtle, resolving softly at the top. About one second, not dramatic, not loud, no big hit, no cymbal.
A soft, warm low impact marking a moment. Gentle rounded thud with a short natural tail, premium and restrained, felt more than heard. Not a big cinematic boom, no harsh slam, no music.

A soft, deep impact with a gentle long tail, for a meaningful reveal. A warm low thud that blooms and decays smoothly, premium and restrained, felt in the chest but never loud. Not a harsh trailer slam, no distortion, no music.
A gentle soft pop for revealing content on screen. Rounded warm bubble pop with a tiny subtle sparkle, premium UI reveal. Short and clean, not loud, dry, no music.
A single soft, clean UI click. Subtle muted mechanical tick, premium and understated, like a menu opening in a high-end app. Very short, dry, no reverb, no music.
A soft, satisfying toggle switch flipping on. Gentle rounded click with a tiny positive upward tail, premium product UI sound. Short and clean, minimal, dry, no music.
A soft, quick message-send confirmation. Subtle airy swish with a light tick, like sending a chat message in a premium app. Very short, understated, dry, no music.
A single soft paper page turn. Light natural page flip of a storybook, gentle and clean, close-miked, short, dry, no music.
A soft positive reward chime, two gentle warm bell notes rising, premium and understated, like unlocking a free gift in a polished app. Short, clean, no long reverb tail, no music bed.
A single wooden chess piece placed firmly on a wooden chess board. One short dry warm wooden knock, close-mic, clean and satisfying, no room echo, no voices, no music.

A wooden chess piece capturing another: two wooden pieces briefly knock together, then one is set down firmly on a wooden board. A decisive double wooden clack, close-mic, clean, no room echo, no music.
A soft reversed air whoosh, like time rewinding: a smooth backwards-sucking sweep that rises and cuts off cleanly. Restrained and premium, low-mids, no metallic ring, no music.
A soft mechanical chess clock ticking gently: about three calm tick-tock cycles, muted, precise, quiet, close-mic, no bell, no music.
A single firm knock on a solid wooden door. One short dry muted knock, close-mic, low and rounded, serious not playful, no echo, no voices, no music.
A short digital glitch stutter: a quick electronic static zap with a subtle pitch drop, dark and restrained, like a video signal corrupting for half a second. Clean, not harsh or screechy, no music.

A low ominous electronic scanning hum sweeping slowly, like a security scanner passing over a screen. Dark, quiet, subtly pulsing, about two and a half seconds, fades out cleanly, no melody, no music.
A metallic trap snapping shut once: a fast sharp mechanical snap with a solid latch click at the end. Tight and decisive, close-mic, short, dry, not cartoonish, no music.
A rubber stamp slamming once onto paper on a desk: a firm dry thump with a subtle paper slap, decisive and clean, close-mic, short, no echo, no music.
Soft rapid keyboard typing on a quiet mechanical keyboard, about two seconds of natural fast typing, muted and premium, close-mic, no voices, no music.
A light delicate magical sparkle twinkle — a soft shimmering glisten of tiny bright bell-like particles, gentle airy and warm, whimsical and quick, storybook, no harshness, no music.

A gentle magical chime — a soft warm bell and glockenspiel twinkle that gently rises and sparkles, wondrous tender and comforting like a firefly's glow appearing in the dark, delicate, no harshness, no music.
A soft gentle breeze moving through trees at dusk — a light airy wind rustling leaves, calm and natural, a little hushed and lonely, no howling, no gusts, no music.
A soft distant owl hooting at night in a quiet forest, two gentle far-away hoots, calm and natural and a little lonely, spacious, no music.
A gentle babbling forest brook — soft trickling water flowing over small stones, calm continuous and soothing, close but gentle, natural, no music.
A warm tender shimmer swell — a soft glowing rise of gentle bell and harp-like sparkle blooming warmly, heartfelt and comforting like a loving embrace, emotional and soft, no drums, no music.
A pencil quickly sketching a dashed line across rough paper, light scratchy graphite strokes in short bursts, close-miked, dry, natural, no music.

A deep muffled launch thump, like a distant mortar or a rocket igniting far away: a soft round low-frequency push with a short body and a gentle tail. Warm and restrained, no sharp crack, no explosion debris, no reverb tail of a war film. Dry, clean, close to a felt mallet on a large drum.
